description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in weathered, mossy shingles. The exterior walls are clad in red-painted vertical wooden planks, with visible signs of aging and wear. The roof features a central vented cupola, adding a touch of character and aiding ventilation. On one side, there are two green wooden doors and a small window, while the opposite side has a single green door, all with simple trim. The base of the cabin appears to be slightly raised, possibly on a stone or concrete foundation. The overall appearance suggests a traditional Scandinavian or Northern European outbuilding, suitable for use as a shed, workshop, or small dwelling.
description: A weathered red wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, mossy shingles, and green doors, featuring a central roof cupola and rustic detailing.
description_view_0: This view shows the cabin's side with a single green door and the gable end, highlighting the roof's mossy texture and the central cupola.
description_view_1: This angle displays the long side of the cabin with a single green door and the full expanse of the shingled roof, emphasizing the weathered appearance.
description_view_2: Here, two green doors and a small window are visible on the gable end, with the roof's cupola and shingle details prominent.
description_view_3: This view shows the plain rear side of the cabin, which lacks doors or windows, and the continuation of the red wooden siding.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a central vented cupola, covered in weathered shingles and slight overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: One small rectangular window on the gable end, asymmetrically placed next to two doors; no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: Two green doors on the gable end (front), one green door on the long side (side entrance); all doors are single and wooden
